body: closes #134 - This PR adds `set_dim_units!` which is used to set the units of a dimension. This is useful if the units of the dimensions of two different `OutputVar`s are different. For example, in one `OutputVar`, the units of `lon` are `degrees_east` and in the other `OutputVar`, the units of `lon` are `degrees`.
title: Add Var.set_dim_units!
